skills.name: _download_drive_file
skills.docstring: Download file from Drive. Returns (bytes, mime_type).

skills.name: _to_image
skills.docstring: Convert to image bytes. Returns (image_bytes, media_type).

skills.name: classify_document
skills.docstring:
Classify and extract data from any financial document.
Downloads from Drive, sends to Claude for classification.
Returns structured dict with doc_type and all extracted fields.

skills.name: build_rows
skills.docstring:
Convert classified doc to (tab_name, header, rows).
For bank/credit card statements each transaction becomes a row.
For receipts each line item becomes a row.

skills.name: muscle_drop_ticket
skills.docstring:
Build and atomically drop a new WorkOrder into hub/.
Returns {"status": "OK", "job_id": job_id, "output": hub_path}.
skills.one_liner: Builds a valid WorkOrder JSON and atomically drops it into `hub/` for the n8n Blind Postman to pick up and execute via foreman.py. This is the primary way to trigger any other muscle.

skills.name: muscle_file_copy
skills.docstring:
Copy file from source to dest.
Creates destination directory if it does not exist.
Returns {"status": "OK", "output": dest} or raises on error.
skills.one_liner: Copies a single file from a source path to a destination path. Creates destination directory if it does not exist.

skills.name: muscle_gdrive_download
skills.docstring:
Download a Google Drive file to output_path.
Returns {"status": "OK", "output": output_path, "mime_type": mime}.

skills.name: muscle_gdrive_watcher
skills.docstring:
Poll a Google Drive folder for new files since last run.
Returns {"status": "OK", "output": state_file, "new_files": [...]}.
Each entry: {id, name, mimeType, webViewLink, createdTime}.

skills.name: muscle_health_check
skills.docstring:
Run a full system health check and write JSON report.
Returns {"status": "OK", "output": output_path} or raises.
skills.one_liner: Runs a full system health check and writes a structured JSON report covering disk space, Python environment, Apex manifest state, foreman heartbeat, and n8n reachability.

skills.name: _deep_merge
skills.docstring: Recursively merge override into base. Last value wins on conflict.

skills.name: muscle_json_merge
skills.docstring:
Deep-merge a list of JSON files. Last file wins on key conflicts.
Returns {"status": "OK", "output": output_path} or raises.
skills.one_liner: Deep-merges two or more JSON files into one. Last file wins on key conflicts.

skills.name: muscle_ocr_batch_retrieve
skills.docstring:
Check batch status. If ended, write per-receipt JSON results.
Returns {"status": "PENDING"|"OK"|"ERROR", ...}.

skills.name: muscle_ocr_batch_submit
skills.docstring:
Submit all batch-prep payloads in payloads_dir as one Anthropic Message Batch.
Returns {"status": "OK", "batch_id": str, "count": int, "output": manifest_file}.

skills.name: _download_file
skills.docstring: Download file bytes, return (bytes, mime_type).

skills.name: _to_image_bytes
skills.docstring: Return (image_bytes, media_type) ready for base64 or Tesseract.

skills.name: _tesseract_ocr
skills.docstring:
Run Tesseract on image bytes.
Returns (text: str, mean_confidence: float).

skills.name: _parse_tesseract_text
skills.docstring:
Best-effort structured extraction from raw Tesseract text.
Returns a partial receipt dict — good enough for clear receipts.

skills.name: muscle_ocr_receipt
skills.docstring:
Two-tier OCR: Tesseract free first, Claude only if confidence < threshold.
mode=batch-prep: writes base64 payload for Anthropic Batch API submission.

skills.name: muscle_receipt_dedup_check
skills.docstring:
Check if file_id has already been processed.
Returns {"status": "OK", "already_processed": True|False}.

skills.name: muscle_receipt_dedup_mark
skills.docstring:
Mark file_id as processed.
Returns {"status": "OK", "output": db_file}.

skills.name: _get_sheet_ids
skills.docstring: Return {tab_name: sheetId} for all existing tabs.

skills.name: _create_tab
skills.docstring: Add a new sheet tab.

skills.name: _tab_is_empty
skills.docstring: Return True if the tab has no data yet.

skills.name: muscle_sheets_append
skills.docstring:
Append rows from rows_file JSON array to the named tab.
Creates tab + writes header if tab is new.
Returns {"status": "OK", "output": range_written, "rows_written": N}.

skills.name: muscle_text_transform
skills.docstring:
Read input file, apply text operation, write to output file.
Operations: upper, lower, strip, replace, word_count.
Returns {"status": "OK", "output": output_path, "word_count": N} or raises.
skills.one_liner: Applies a text transformation operation to a file: uppercase, lowercase, strip whitespace, find-replace, or word count.

skills.name: read_register
skills.docstring: Read the full contents of DOCUMENT_REGISTER.md.

skills.name: get_current_sequence
skills.docstring: Extract the next available sequence number from the Sequence Tracker.

skills.name: validate_inputs
skills.docstring: Validate originator and type codes. Returns list of errors (empty = valid).

skills.name: validate_ref_code
skills.docstring: Check if a reference code matches the canonical pattern.

skills.name: build_ref_code
skills.docstring: Construct a reference code from its components.

skills.name: append_to_register
skills.docstring: Append a new row to the Document Register table and bump the sequence.

skills.name: _now_iso
imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

skills.name: _append_rows_direct
skills.docstring: Write rows to Google Sheets, creating tab + header if needed.
imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

skills.name: process_single_file
skills.docstring:
Full pipeline for one Drive file:
1. Dedup check
2. Classify + extract (Claude)
3. Append to correct sheet tab
4. Mark as processed
imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

skills.name: run_batch
skills.docstring:
Scan Drive for new files, process all of them.
Returns summary dict.
imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

skills.name: _scheduler_loop
skills.docstring: Background thread: run batch every 5 minutes.
imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

skills.docstring: Body: {"file_id": "...", "receipt_id": "..."}

Body: {"file_id": "...", "image_url": "...", "mode": "single"}
Returns structured receipt JSON.

skills.docstring: Body: {"tab_name": "Receipts_2026", "rows": [[...], ...]}
imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

skills.name: drive_upload
skills.docstring:
Upload a file to the watched Drive folder.
Accepts multipart/form-data with field 'file', OR JSON body with
{"filename": "...", "mimeType": "...", "data": "<base64>"}.
Returns {"status": "OK", "file_id": ID, "name": NAME, "webViewLink": URL}
imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

skills.name: batch_trigger
skills.docstring: Manually trigger a batch scan + process run.

skills.name: batch_status
skills.docstring: Return the result of the last batch run.
imports: from flask import Flask, jsonify, request

skills.name: WF-01 Bermcoin Onboarding
skills.docstring: Stripe checkout -> Supabase upsert -> magic link -> affiliate -> Telegram ops

skills.name: WF-02 Bermcoin Rate Watchdog
skills.docstring: 15min rate fetch with 3-source fallback -> match watches -> multichannel nudge

skills.name: WF-03 Bermcoin Monthly Reset
skills.docstring: 1st of month: reset nudge counters, reactivate paused watches, notify members

skills.name: WF-04 Bermcoin Offboarding
skills.docstring: Stripe subscription deleted -> soft-cancel member -> churn log -> Telegram ops

skills.name: WF-05 Bermcoin Self-Healing
skills.docstring: Daily health check, IOF/fee drift detection, stale rate recovery, ops summary

skills.name: BERMCOIN-APX-MSC-00008
skills.docstring: Muscle: Support ticket pipeline — form to Supabase to n8n to Telegram to email confirmation

skills.name: delete-account
skills.docstring: Edge function: GDPR account deletion with 30-day grace period

skills.name: collect-event

approved_tools.name: muscle_replit_builder_packet
approved_tools.one_liner: Creates a Replit Agent handoff packet from Claude-style build instructions. The packet lets Claude remain the planner and reviewer while Replit becomes the core code builder for app creation or iteration.

approved_tools.name: muscle_headless_inventory
approved_tools.one_liner: Captures a read-only headless laptop inventory for Apex remote-worker setup without collecting secret values.

approved_tools.name: muscle_resource_guard
approved_tools.one_liner: Prevents startup clashes and unsafe scheduled-job overlap by checking disk, memory, duplicate-job locks, backup/deploy/destructive locks, and optional GPU lock ownership.
